Vendor Audit Confirmation

Complete Payment to Start Consultant-Led Verification

VendorVerify follows a consultant-led model where analysts manually validate vendor risk and share a decision-ready report before you release advance payments.

UPI Payment Details

  • Name: ADITYA CHAUDHARY
  • UPI ID: 9953896410@kotak811

Payment Instructions

  1. Step 1

    Scan the QR code using any UPI app such as Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, or BHIM.

  2. Step 2

    Send payment to UPI ID: 9953896410@kotak811

  3. Step 3

    After completing payment, share the payment screenshot.

Share Payment Proof

After completing payment, please share the payment screenshot along with your Case ID.

WhatsApp: +91 9637439000 / +91 9953896410

Email: contact@vendorverify.in

Send Payment Confirmation on WhatsApp
Payments are verified manually. Please allow up to 24 hours for payment reconciliation and audit confirmation.

Status: Waiting for Payment Confirmation

After manual verification by the consultant, the status becomes: Audit Submitted.

₹4,999 Audit vs ₹10,00,000 Risk

VendorVerify Audit Cost

₹4,999

Typical Vendor Transaction Risk

₹5 lakh – ₹50 lakh

Spending ₹4,999 to verify a supplier before paying ₹10 lakh is not a cost — it is protection.

Most companies discover vendor fraud only after making the payment. VendorVerify helps identify risk before money leaves your account.
